name: Oats

pros.title: beta-glucans are a real category-level advantage
pros.explanation: Oats bring unusually useful soluble fibre for a grain, which supports satiety and cholesterol-friendly meal structure beyond the base carb panel.

pros.title: contain avenanthramides that most grains do not
pros.explanation: Those oat-specific polyphenols give oats a more distinctive wholegrain case than generic starch staples.

pros.title: easy to build into filling meals without much processing
pros.explanation: Plain oats are cheap, versatile, and can anchor a satiating breakfast better than many refined cereal options.

cons.title: phytates can slightly blunt mineral absorption
cons.explanation: That does not cancel the nutrition, but it is a fair caveat when oats are treated as a mineral powerhouse.

cons.title: the health profile shifts when oats are instant or finely processed
cons.explanation: More processed oat formats usually digest faster and can behave worse than intact or less processed oats.

cons.title: sweet add-ons often turn a good base into a sugar-heavy bowl
cons.explanation: The plain food can be solid while the common serving style people actually eat is much messier.

sourceNotes: Sample data for FoodRanked test pack.
Values are approximate and should be replaced with canonical source data later.
